title: The Vampire's Vacation
desc: A hotel guest says he's a vampire. Truth, or a trick? 🧛

q.en: Who did Josh think the strange man in black really was?
q.zh: 乔什认为那个穿黑衣的陌生人到底是什么人？

options.en: A vampire
options.zh: 一个吸血鬼

options.en: A police officer
options.zh: 一名警察

options.en: A movie star
options.zh: 一位电影明星

options.en: A bank robber
options.zh: 一名银行劫匪

explain.en: At first Josh was sure the pale man in black was a real vampire, not a famous actor.
explain.zh: 起初乔什坚信那个面色苍白、一身黑衣的人是真正的吸血鬼，而不是什么著名演员。

q.en: Which clues made Josh believe the man might be a vampire?
q.zh: 哪些线索让乔什相信那人可能是吸血鬼？

options.en: He wore a black cape and showed his fangs according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 他披着黑色斗篷，还露出了尖牙（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: He had pale skin, skinny lips, black clothes, and dark sunglasses
options.zh: 他皮肤苍白、嘴唇薄、一身黑衣，还戴着墨镜

options.en: He drank blood right in the supermarket
options.zh: 他在超市里直接喝血

options.en: He slept hanging upside down like a bat
options.zh: 他像蝙蝠一样倒挂着睡觉

explain.en: Josh pointed out the man's pale skin and skinny lips, plus his all-black outfit and dark sunglasses, as vampire signs.
explain.zh: 乔什指出那人皮肤苍白、嘴唇薄，再加上一身黑衣和墨镜，觉得这些都像吸血鬼的特征。

q.en: How did the man in black seem to vanish from Ellie's Diner and the Book Nook?
q.zh: 穿黑衣的人是怎么从艾丽的餐车和小说书店『消失』的？

options.en: He turned into a bat and flew away according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 他变成蝙蝠飞走了（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: He used a magic trick
options.zh: 他用了魔术

options.en: He walked through the wall
options.zh: 他穿墙而过了

options.en: He left through the back door while the kids entered the front
options.zh: 趁孩子们从正门进来时，他从后门溜走了

explain.en: Jimmy left through each shop's back door just as the kids came in the front, so it looked like he had disappeared.
explain.zh: 吉米趁孩子们从正门进店时从后门离开，所以看起来就像凭空消失了。

q.en: What name did the man sign in with at the Shangri-la Hotel?
q.zh: 那人在香格里拉酒店登记时用的名字是什么？

options.en: Lionel Linkletter
options.zh: 莱昂内尔·林克莱特

options.en: Jimmy Jett
options.zh: 吉米·杰特

options.en: Dr. A. Cula
options.zh: A. 库拉医生

options.en: Count Dracula
options.zh: 德古拉伯爵

explain.en: He signed the hotel register as Dr. A. Cula, the name his Dracula character uses.
explain.zh: 他在酒店登记簿上签的是A. 库拉医生，那是他出演的德古拉角色所用的名字。

q.en: Ruth Rose first spelled the name with blocks as 'Dr. Cula.' What did Dink add to turn it into DRACULA?
q.zh: 露丝·罗丝最初用积木拼出『Dr. Cula』。丁克加了什么让它变成了 DRACULA？

options.en: He added a D block at the start
options.zh: 他在开头加了一块 D 积木

options.en: He added an O block after the L according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 他在 L 后面加了一块 O 积木（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: He added an A block between the R and C
options.zh: 他在 R 和 C 之间加了一块 A 积木

options.en: He added an E block at the end
options.zh: 他在末尾加了一块 E 积木

explain.en: Dink slid an A block between the R and C, turning DR CULA into DRACULA.
explain.zh: 丁克把一块 A 积木插在 R 和 C 之间，于是 DR CULA 就变成了 DRACULA。

q.en: What did the kids find in Dr. Cula's hotel room that revealed the trick?
q.zh: 孩子们在库拉医生的酒店房间里发现了什么，从而揭穿了把戏？

options.en: A coffin and a set of fake fangs according to some versions of the story in an early draft of the book
options.zh: 一口棺材和一副假尖牙（按书中另一种说法）（在书的早期草稿中）

options.en: A purple list of names and a box of Band-Aids, written with Nate's Party Purple crayon
options.zh: 一张紫色名单和一盒创可贴，是用内特那支派对紫蜡笔画的

options.en: A letter from a movie studio
options.zh: 一封电影制片厂的信

options.en: A map of Green Lawn
options.zh: 一张格林朗镇地图

explain.en: The list was written in purple that smelled like jellybeans — Nate's Party Purple crayon — proving Ruth Rose had written it.
explain.zh: 名单是用紫色的笔写的，还带着果冻豆的味道——那是内特的派对紫蜡笔，证明是露丝·罗丝写的。

q.en: Who was the 'vampire' in black actually?
q.zh: 那个穿黑衣的『吸血鬼』其实是谁？

options.en: Mr. Paskey, the bookstore owner
options.zh: 书店老板帕斯基先生

options.en: Officer Fallon, the police chief
options.zh: 警察局长法伦警官

options.en: Mr. Linkletter, the hotel clerk according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 酒店职员林克莱特先生（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: Jimmy Jett, an actor playing Dracula
options.zh: 吉米·杰特，一位扮演德古拉的演员

explain.en: The man was Jimmy Jett, an actor on his way to film a Dracula movie. He was only joking around.
explain.zh: 那人其实是吉米·杰特，一位正要去拍德古拉电影的演员。他只是在开玩笑。

q.en: Why had Jimmy Jett stopped in Green Lawn?
q.zh: 吉米·杰特为什么会停在格林朗镇？

options.en: To meet Dink, Josh, and Ruth Rose according to some versions of the story in an early draft of the book
options.zh: 去见丁克、乔什和露丝·罗丝（按书中另一种说法）（在书的早期草稿中）

options.en: He was on vacation heading to Vermont and the town looked like a nice place to stop
options.zh: 他去佛蒙特州度假途中，觉得这个镇子看起来不错就停了下来

options.en: To film a horror movie there
options.zh: 去那里拍恐怖片

options.en: To visit his relatives
options.zh: 去探望亲戚

explain.en: Jimmy said he was on his way to Vermont for a vacation and stopped in Green Lawn because it looked like a nice place.
explain.zh: 吉米说他正要去佛蒙特州度假，因为格林朗看起来是个不错的地方，就停了下来。

q.en: Who was really behind the prank that fooled the kids?
q.zh: 真正策划这场捉弄孩子们的恶作剧的是谁？

options.en: Jimmy Jett, helped by Ellie, Mr. Paskey, Mr. Linkletter, Officer Fallon, and Ruth Rose
options.zh: 吉米·杰特，在艾丽、帕斯基先生、林克莱特先生、法伦警官和露丝·罗丝的帮助下

options.en: Only Josh, as a joke on his friends
options.zh: 只有乔什，为了捉弄朋友

options.en: A real vampire who lived in town
options.zh: 一个住在镇上的真吸血鬼

options.en: Ruth Rose, to teach them a lesson according to some versions of the story in an early draft of the book
options.zh: 露丝·罗丝，为了给他们一个教训（按书中另一种说法）（在书的早期草稿中）

explain.en: Jimmy started the prank and the others joined in, even Officer Fallon at the end, to scare the kids for fun.
explain.zh: 吉米发起了这场恶作剧，其他人也跟着参与，连法伦警官最后也加入，只为吓唬孩子们玩。

q.en: How does the story end, at the New York movie theater?
q.zh: 故事在纽约的电影院里是如何收尾的？

options.en: Jimmy gives them vampire fangs to watch the movie DRACULA'S DAUGHTER
options.zh: 吉米给了他们吸血鬼尖牙，一起看电影《德古拉之女》

options.en: The vampire bites them all
options.zh: 吸血鬼把他们全咬了

options.en: The kids go straight home
options.zh: 孩子们直接回家了

options.en: The kids catch the real vampire according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 孩子们抓住了真正的吸血鬼（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Jimmy sat next to Josh wearing a cape and gave the three kids fake fangs as they watched his new movie, DRACULA'S DAUGHTER.
explain.zh: 吉米披着斗篷坐在乔什旁边，在孩子们观看他的新片《德古拉之女》时，发给他们每人一副假尖牙。
